{"ID":211001310,"TalkGroupID":211001165,"NpcIndex":-2,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"只见这名修士服下灵丹，自丹田处一缕缕灵气迸发，霎时间，惊得周遭魂魄四散而去。而它丹田处的灵气愈发精纯，隐隐触及元婴门槛。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}

{"ID":211001311,"TalkGroupID":211001165,"NpcIndex":1,"IntervalSecs":[2,2],"WaitSecs":5,"TalkDescKey":0,"TalkDescEditor":"小友大恩，本座没齿难忘，这些珍宝你且收下，他日本座再寻访小友洞府，以表答谢。","FixIntervalSecs":2,"RandomIntervalSecMin":2,"RandomIntervalSecMax":2}
